package.name: unibots_ultrasonic
package.description:
Ultrasonic (HC-SR04 style) proximity sensing for the Unibots UK 2026 holonomic mecanum robot. Drives an arbitrary, config-defined set of sensors (front / sides / extensible to back), publishes a per-sensor sensor_msgs/Range, a fused unibots_msgs/ObstacleArray for the APF / MPC collision-avoidance pipeline, and a last-resort /safety/collision_warning hard-stop guard.
Supports rulebook section 3.2 (non-contact sport, collision avoidance required). Hardware backend is gpiozero (lgpio pin factory, matching hardware_motor_node); a mock backend allows off-Pi development and CI.
